MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON APR-29-2021 IN 206, DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL AND ALL RELATED PRE-TRIAL DATES. PARVIX DARABI, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF VIA COURTCALL. KEVIN REESE, ESQ. AND TREY SIMS, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS VIA COURTCALL. AFTER ARGUMENT, THE COURT GRANTS DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL. THE TRIAL DATE OF 8/23/21 IS VACATED AND THE NEW TRIAL DATE IS 2/28/22 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. ALL PRETRIAL DEADLINES, DISCOVERY AND MOTION PRACTICE INCLUDING 2034 CCP EXPERT DISCOVERY SHALL BE GOVERNED BY THE NEW TRIAL DATE. THE COURT ORDERS MR. DARABI TO PAY $60.00 FILING FEE NO LATER THAN 4:30PM TODAY FOR NOT PROVIDING COURTESY COPIES OF THE PAPERS WITH THE COURT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT AND MR. SIMS TO SERVE THE ORDER. NOTICE WAIVED BY PARTIES. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
